title: Angular Momentum of a Flying Bird
body: A bird flies overhead from where you stand at an altitude of $$300.0$$ $$m$$ and at a speed horizontal to the ground of $$20.0$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. The bird has a mass of $$2.0$$ kg. The radius vector to the bird makes an angle theta with respect to the ground. The radius vector to the bird and its momentum vector lie in the xy-plane.
